MISMATCH.en: Face matching result is a mismatch.

FACE_NOT_FOUND.en: No faces are found on the image.

TOO_MANY_FACES.ko: 이미지에 두 개 이상의 얼굴이 있습니다.
TOO_MANY_FACES.en: There is more than one face on the image.

SMALL_FACE_SIZE.en: The face box is too small.

SMALL_RELATIVE_FACE_SIZE.en: The face relative size is too small.

SMALL_PUPILLARY_DISTANCE.en: The distance between pupils on the face is too small.

LARGE_FACE_ROTATION_ANGLE.en: The rotation angle of the head is too big.

FACE_TOO_CLOSE.en: The face is too close to the camera.

FACE_CLOSE_TO_BORDER.en: The face is too close to one or more image borders.

FACE_OCCLUDED.en: The face is occluded, for example with a medical mask.

FAKE.ko: 실제 얼굴 이미지로 확인되지 않습니다. 다시 시도해 주시기 바랍니다.
FAKE.en: Not verified with a real face image. Please try again.
